title.en: So what? It's none of my business! 그래서 뭐? 내 일 아니야!

description.en: When you want to set boundaries regarding things that don't concern you or unnecessary interference! Practice expressing a clear attitude with 그래서 뭐 and 내 일 아니야.
description.ko: 나랑 상관없는 일이나 불필요한 참견에 대해 선을 긋고 싶을 때! 그래서 뭐와 내 일 아니야를 사용해 명확한 태도를 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Boundaries. Indifference. Individualism. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 옆집 사람들이 어제 크게 싸웠다는데 혹시 소리 못 들었어요?
content.translation: John. did you hear the neighbors arguing loudly yesterday by any chance?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아파트 전체가 떠들썩했다고 하더라고요.
content.translation: I heard the whole apartment complex was in an uproar.

content.speaker: John
content.text: So what? 그래서 뭐요?
content.translation: So what? So what?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그 사람들이 싸우든 말든 내 일 아니예요.
content.translation: Whether they fight or not. it's not my business.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존은 정말 자기 생활에만 집중하는군요!
content.translation: You really focus only on your own life. John!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가끔은 주변 소식에도 관심을 가져보는 게 어때요?
content.translation: How about taking some interest in the news around you sometimes?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐. This is a very short but powerful reaction.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방이 말한 내용이 나에게 아무런 의미가 없을 때 써요.
content.translation: Yes. You use it when what the other person said has no meaning to you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "그게 나랑 무슨 상관인데?" 라는 뜻을 담고 있죠.
content.translation: It carries the meaning of "What does that have to do with me?"

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐?
content.translation: So what?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 내 일 아니야.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이 표현은 "그건 그 사람의 문제지 나의 문제가 아니다" 라고 선을 긋는 말이에요.
content.translation: This expression is a way to set a boundary. saying "That's their problem. not my problem."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 불필요한 감정 소모를 피하고 싶을 때 아주 유용하게 쓰입니다.
content.translation: It's very useful when you want to avoid unnecessary emotional consumption.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 일 아니야.
content.translation: It's not my business.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine someone tells me that a colleague I don't even know is quitting their job.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 소식 들었어요? 저기 다른 부서에 있는 마이클 씨가 오늘 회사를 그만둔대요!
content.translation: John. did you hear the news? Michael from that other department is quitting the company today!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다들 그 이유가 뭔지 궁금해서 난리예요.
content.translation: Everyone is in a fuss because they're curious about the reason.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐요? 전 그 사람이 누군지도 잘 모르는데요.
content.translation: So what? I don't even know who that person is.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그래도 같은 회사 동료인데 너무 무관심한 거 아니에요?
content.translation: Still. isn't it being too indifferent since he's a colleague at the same company?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그 사람이 그만두는 건 내 일 아니예요. 제 할 일만 잘하면 되죠!
content.translation: Him quitting is not my business. I just need to do my job well!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 듣고 보니 존의 말이 맞네요. 남의 일에 너무 신경 쓸 필요는 없죠.
content.translation: Now that I hear it. you're right. John. There's no need to care too much about others' business.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sometimes the best way to stay happy is to mind your own business.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 남의 일에 참견하기보다 나 자신의 행복에 집중하는 게 좋아요.
content.translation: Right. It's better to focus on your own happiness rather than interfering in others' business.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 소중한 에너지를 아껴보세요!
content.translation: Save your precious energy with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "mind your own business" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래서 뭐? So what?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 일 아니야! It's not my business!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 알바 아니야! It's none of my business!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 관심 없어! I'm not interested!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 상관 하지마! Don't interfere!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 불필요한 소문에서 벗어나 나에게 집중하는 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a day focused on yourselves. free from unnecessary rumors today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.meaning: To be in an uproar. To be noisy
vocabulary.example: 시장 안이 사람들로 떠들썩해요. (The inside of the market is noisy with people.)
제 일에 너무 참견하지 마세요. (Don't interfere in my business too much.)
감정 소모가 너무 심해서 힘들어요. (It's hard because the emotional waste is too much.)
존은 정말 훌륭한 동료예요. (John is a truly wonderful colleague.)
사회 문제에 무관심하면 안 돼요. (You shouldn't be indifferent to social issues.)
남들의 시선에 휘둘리지 마세요. (Don't be swayed by others' eyes.)
